sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65723" key="meilixo/ghrus" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μειλῐχό-γηρυς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">υ</itype>, <sense id="n65723.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">soft-voiced</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">γλῶσσα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0266.tlg001:12:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Tyrt.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.8</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
